features: ONVIF Profile G, S, and T conformant

Advanced Analytics suite: motion, exception, line crossing, loitering, sound detection, region intrusion, object detection, vehicle/people detection, face detection, people/vehicle counting, tampering detection (full listed analytics may require a Speco recorder)
adaptive IR LEDs reduce IR saturation/hotspots
audio codec G.711A/G.711U, 3.5mm audio in/out plus built-in mic

frigate.notes: Network protocol list confirmed directly from Speco's own official spec sheet PDF, explicitly including RTSP (alongside UDP, IPv4/IPv6, DHCP, NTP, PPPoE, DDNS, SMTP, FTP, SNMP, 802.1x, UPnP, HTTP, HTTPS). ONVIF Profile G/S/T conformance also confirmed. Exact RTSP URL path was not stated in the official spec sheet; use ONVIF auto-discovery or check the camera's web UI.

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF Profile G/S/T conformance confirmed directly from the manufacturer's own official spec sheet.

blue_iris.notes: Confirmed RTSP protocol support and strong ONVIF conformance make this a likely good fit; not independently confirmed with Blue Iris specifically.
